author: matei_zaharia

opening_patterns: The real bottleneck in AI isn't

example_posts: Hot take: compound AI systems will outperform monolithic models for most enterprise use cases within 2 years. The orchestration layer is the new moat.
Underrated: the importance of good data infrastructure for AI. Everyone focuses on models, but the data layer is where most projects fail.
The real bottleneck in AI isn't compute or models. It's the feedback loop between production and training. This is what MLOps should actually solve.
